docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
NOTE:WARNED OF CM,<20DYS.SAID"OK,WAS ALSO SRVD CM"
CERTIFIED MAIL TO PHYLLIS SCHROBSDORFF RETURNED SIGNED.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,133.33 FILED BY HETTMANSPERGER, JEFF AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,556.00 FILED BY SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HETTMANSPERGER, JEFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
DEFT/CROSS CLAIMANT SCHROBSDORFF RAISED A CCP170.6 CHALLENGE AS TO COMM KAPLAN. MATTER IS CON'T FOR HEARING ON 8/9/96 AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE DEPT M30.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS
CERT MAIL TO JEFF HETTMANSPERGER RETURNED UNCLAIMED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HETTMANSPERGER, JEFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS $202.93 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $223.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $24.76 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $282.42 AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS
CORRESPONDENC FROM DEFENDANT RCVD. AND GIVEN TO NORA.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-02-1996, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUL-15-1996 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-15-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-09-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HETTMANSPERGER, JEFF CROSS COMPLAINT ORALLY DISMISSED BY DEFT AT HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS
